name: _template
description: Canonical shape for a stack profile. Copy this, fill it, name it <stack>.json.

detect._comment: Hints the stack-detect skill uses to recognize this stack. Presence of any file/glob here is a signal.

gate._comment: Each is a shell command run from THIS COMPONENT's directory (the repo root for the cross-cutting root gate), or null to skip. Order of execution is fixed by the harness: format -> lint -> typecheck -> build -> test -> e2e.

commands._comment: Operational commands surfaced into CLAUDE.md / AGENT_NOTES.md.

lsp._comment: Language servers the agent should rely on for diagnostics (via the IDE/MCP). Informational; helps the agent prefer LSP over guessing.
